title: pyrethrum multicaule
intro: Pyrethrum multicaule is a perennial plant in the sunflower family, known for its bright yellow flowers and medicinal properties. The plant contains pyrethrin, a natural insecticide, which has been used to repel insects and soothe skin irritations. Medicinally, pyrethrum multicaule is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, offering relief from pain, fever, and infections. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, tinctures, and ointments, which can be used topically to treat wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues.
